global_queries: unmanned aerial vehicle guidance and control

subdomains.name: Visual-inertial and SLAM-based navigation
subdomains.description: Foundational for GNSS-denied operation; combines camera and IMU data for pose estimation and map building; enables real-time, drift-resilient localization in indoor and urban canyons.
preferred_venues: IEEE Transactions on Aerospace and Electronic Systems

subdomains.name: Robust multi-sensor fusion and GNSS-denied navigation
subdomains.description: Critical for safety-critical deployment; integrates LiDAR, UWB, barometer, magnetic, and vision under uncertainty; addresses sensor failure, latency, and environmental degradation.
queries: multi sensor fusion for drone navigation
preferred_venues: IEEE Transactions on Control Systems Technology
AIAA Journal of Guidance, Control, and Dynamics

subdomains.name: Learning-based and neural navigation
subdomains.description: Emerging paradigm using end-to-end or modular deep learning, reinforcement learning, and world models for adaptive path planning and obstacle avoidance in unstructured environments.
queries: neural network for drone path planning
preferred_venues: IEEE Transactions on Neural Networks and Learning Systems

subdomains.name: Safe autonomous navigation stack integration
subdomains.description: Covers the system-level orchestration of perception, state estimation, planning, and control with formal guarantees on robustness, real-time performance, and certification-readiness.
queries: obstacle avoidance path planning for UAVs
preferred_venues: IEEE Transactions on Aerospace and Electronic Systems
